new_value: {"notes":"Canonical implementation preserved in 40dcb4c2f: both L2 paths propagate link-init failure, latch boot failure, reject retries, and link_crypto wraps Zephyr CSPRNG for deterministic failure/non-mutation coverage. Host link_ctx CTest passes and three static reviews found no code issues. Remains open: identical vendored bridge hunks are preserved in its dirty .35.5 migration file; Linux native_sim compile/runtime and caller-level L2 fault execution blocked by expired AWS personal SSO."}

Completed entropy failure handling in link_ctx init for both C (fail-closed before mutation) and aligned Rust lichen-link epoch docs/tests. Callers updated, all related L2 init/ordering/security issues audited+fixed. Validation/tests/reviews pass. Inherited fix workflow advanced.
